headings.text: Implement a Modern Approach to Cloud Security Governance
Oversee Control and Direction of Cloud Services
Manage Risk While Enabling the Benefits of Cloud Computing
Become an Organization of “Know” instead of “No”

paragraphs: The cloud introduces efficiency and enables innovation to facilitate modern and competitive architectures. As cloud environments are in constant flux, they constantly evolve in tandem with new enhancements and your organization must evaluate new capabilities and features against its security, budgetary and regulatory requirements. This oftentimes can lead to hasty decisions that result in poor integration, configurations without proper access control, lack of alignment between cloud teams and yo
Our cloud governance solution gives you the ability to make informed decisions that will allow your organization to safely move at the speed of the cloud.

headings.text: Ensure Cloud Governance With Our Five Phase Methodology

paragraphs: Since the inception of cloud computing, administrators, engineers and builders can extend the data center too easily and sometimes the new environments appear to be a different organization within the same organization.

Our team of experts leverage our five-phase methodology to ensure your organization has a properly implemented Cloud Governance solution. For many organizations operating in the cloud, proper identification and implementation of controls really do matter. Our unique methodology ensures your organization meets the requirements that are critical for managing operations and security risk by bringing together your GRC, security and cloud teams.

headings.text: The Right Approach to Cloud Governance Services

paragraphs: Our approach to cloud security will build an understanding of your business goals for cloud adoption, guide you in creating organizational policies and standards for those goals and ensure your cloud systems meet those requirements as well as security and compliance best practices. Our team of cloud security experts will communicate with critical stakeholders and do a comprehensive risk assessment to provide a roadmap for your business.

Throughout the process, we act as your trusted advisor. Our Cloud Governance approach rests on the shoulders of our Governance and Risk Practice and helps you carry the heavy elements on the organizational side.

paragraphs: Our service leverages cloud governance solutions to help better ensure compliance with governance rules, take advantage of cloud-based disaster recovery solutions that enhance your application security, optimize operational efficiency, mitigate cybersecurity risks and ultimately enable seamless scalability.
Gain visibility to control workloads against regulatory baselines and security standards.
Keep your security controls updated as regulations and threats continue to evolve.
Institute processes that focus on risk mitigation and resource allocation optimization.
